description: Enhances whichever Silver Siphoner perk you own — chains reach further, afflictions cut deeper, shields stretch wider, suffering spreads thicker.
tooltipTemplate: Enhances your Silver Siphoner perk. Pick a Silver perk to see its specific bonus.

tooltipTemplateByOwnedPerk.amplify_damage: Amplify Damage: {amplifyRadiusMultiplier:1}× radius, {amplifyDurationMultiplier:1}× duration, +{amplifyDamageTakenMultiplierBonus%} damage amplification.
tooltipTemplateByOwnedPerk.chain_siphon: Chain Siphon: +{chainAdditionalTargetCountBonus:0} target, {chainRangeMultiplier:1}× range, +{chainSecondaryDamageMultiplierBonus%} secondary damage, +{chainSecondaryHealingMultiplierBonus%} secondary healing.
tooltipTemplateByOwnedPerk.dark_renewal: Dark Renewal: +{darkMaxSelfShieldBonus:0} self shield cap, +{darkMaxAllyShieldBonus:0} ally shield cap, +{darkAdditionalAllyShieldTargets:0} additional ally targets for overflow shielding.
